description:
Looking for the Best Health Insurance Policy brand in India? 🤔 In this video, we compare top medical insurance providers: Star Health, Care Health, HDFC ERGO, and ICICI Lombard! Discover their coverage options, benefits, and customer satisfaction ratings to help you make an informed decision for your family's health needs. Don't miss our detailed analysis and find the perfect plan for you! 💪💙 #HealthInsurance #India #StarHealth #CareHealth #HDFCERGO #ICICILombard #medicalinsurance 

Note :

Data Source : All data referenced is sourced from Ditto.com for transparency and reliability.

Claim Settlement & Complaints Overview : Claim Settlement Ratio and Complaint Volume are based on an average of the past three years (2020–2023), providing a balanced view of insurer performance.

Complaints per 10,000 Claims : Complaint volume is measured per 10,000 claims, giving insight into customer satisfaction and service efficiency.

Important Note on Terms & Conditions :
Always read the Terms & Conditions carefully before purchasing any insurance plan. Make sure you understand the policy details and potential risks involved.

comments.text:
Care Health:
1. Scamsters!!
2. Would try their best to reject any Cashless claims with flimsy reasons
3. Never apply for their Policies ONLINE since the local agents around you would relinquish any responsibility for their company's misdeeds. Their agents receive 15% commission on each policy and would try their best to inflate the proposal at any possible level with unnecessary add-ons.
4. Once you make a payment, teres's a considerable delay from them to generate the policy.
5. The clauses of the PED's in the policy would be twisted in such a way that you would never get a claim if you had a history of Diabetes, Hypertension or other ailments.
6.If you are the patient and are bedridden, they would call you after a few days after a claim rejection and do some sweet talk explaining the reason eventually putting the blame on you.
7. No empathy shown to an emergency case, their priority is to reject any claims as soon as they receive- one.
8. Never expect a quick response from their support team
9. To conclude, take up a policy from them at your own peril
10. Their focus is to retain a customer and make you renew the policies every year, for an uninterrupted revenue for them
11. They follow a pattern of false assurances
12 Once the policy is issued, read it thoroughly if it does not match your PED's or Lifestyle diseases , cancel it, else you will not be able to get a refund of the policy after a claim is rejected.
